permits.description: Gut renovation of single family attached dwelling to studs. Demo chimney to basement, new roof, new electrical, new plumbing, new hvac, new windows, new blueboard and plaster. Adding 1/2 bath to 1st floor. Reframe 2nd floor bedrooms and bathrooms as per plan. Basement floor is uneven and cracked in areas. Demo existing rat slab in basement to pour new flat floor for finishing. No change in height. Frame laundry room, mechanical room, and family room in basement.
